steps: Login with an account that has an active Play Store receipt but shows 'Free' in-app
tests.expected_result: App successfully validates the receipt with the store and upgrades account status to Premium immediately.

tests.scenario: Restore Purchase with No Valid Receipt
steps: Login with a truly free account (no store receipt)
tests.expected_result: App displays a clear message stating 'No active subscription found' without crashing or looping.

steps: Ensure user is logged in on Version 1.0
Install Version 1.1 update over the existing app
tests.expected_result: The user remains logged in and the home screen loads their personalized content without a login prompt.

steps: Change the account password on Device B (Web)
Open the app on Device A
tests.expected_result: The app identifies the invalid token and redirects the user to the login screen instead of entering a loop.

tests.scenario: Lock Icon Visibility for Free Users
steps: Login as a Free Tier user
tests.expected_result: All subscription-only Sleepcasts display a visible Lock icon overlay on the thumbnail.

tests.scenario: Lock Icon Absence for Premium Users
steps: Login as a Premium Tier user
tests.expected_result: No Lock icons are visible on the thumbnails, indicating all content is accessible.

steps: Open Filter menu and select 'Free Sessions'
tests.expected_result: The resulting list contains only sessions that do not require a subscription to play.

steps: Search for a hyper-specific keyword like 'Advanced Vedic Mastery'
tests.expected_result: The app displays a 'No free sessions found' message rather than showing paid results.

steps: Press the device power button to lock the screen
tests.expected_result: Audio playback continues steadily without the OS killing the background process.
The audio pauses during the ring and automatically resumes playback immediately after the call is declined.

steps: Download a 10-minute session to local storage
Attempt to play the downloaded session
tests.expected_result: The audio plays successfully without a 'No Connection' error popup.

steps: Start a download and cancel it at 10%
Attempt to play that specific session
tests.expected_result: The app provides a clear message that the file is incomplete and requires internet to finish.
Promotional banners and the 'Community' tab are hidden; the UI is clean and focused.
The Minimalist UI state persists across app restarts without reverting to the default cluttered view.

steps: Count taps required to reach the 'Breathing' timer start button
tests.expected_result: The user reaches the start button in exactly 2 taps.

steps: Pin 'Favorite Course' to the bottom navigation bar
Launch app and tap the new pinned icon
tests.expected_result: The user enters their specific course in exactly 1 tap from the home screen.
The local streak counter increments by 1 immediately after session completion while still offline.

steps: Allow app to sync with server
tests.expected_result: The server-side streak updates to match the local count without resetting to zero.

steps: Open the 'Basics' course (which has an updated narrator)
tests.expected_result: The audio player loads the original voice files instead of the new updated version.

steps: Close app and open a different course module
tests.expected_result: The app maintains the 'Original Narrator' choice for all modules within that course.

steps: Simulate a 500 Internal Server Error from the API
tests.expected_result: The app bypasses the main loading screen and automatically displays the 'Emergency Offline' menu with cached sessions.

steps: Trigger Emergency Offline Mode via simulated 503 error
Select one of the 'Last 3 Played' sessions
tests.expected_result: The session plays immediately using local data without attempting to contact the broken server.
The app UI automatically adopts the dark theme (#000000 or dark grey backgrounds) to match the system.

steps: Manually toggle 'Dark Mode' to ON while system is in Light Mode
tests.expected_result: The app interface switches to the dark theme regardless of the global system setting.

steps: Force-close the app during an active meditation session
tests.expected_result: A 'Session Recovery' prompt appears asking if the user finished their meditation to save their streak.

steps: Complete a session that failed to sync
tests.expected_result: The session is added to the user's history and the daily streak is updated.
A confirmation pop-up displays the course size (e.g., '145MB') and the user's available device storage.

steps: Fill device storage until only 50MB remains
tests.expected_result: The app prevents the download and displays an error: 'Insufficient storage space to download this course'.

steps: Enable 'Extreme Battery Saver' mode on the device (which usually kills all background activity)
Lock the screen and wait for 10 minutes
tests.expected_result: The app's Foreground Service overrides the OS battery restriction, and audio continues playing uninterrupted.

steps: Manually change the device system date to 2 days in the past
Re-enable internet and allow the app to sync
tests.expected_result: The system identifies the timestamp mismatch and uses the 'Session End' server-time metadata to prevent streak corruption or 'time-travel' cheating.

steps: Begin playing a 100% downloaded session in Airplane Mode
While audio is playing, use a system cleaner or external file manager to delete the app's 'Downloads' folder
tests.expected_result: The app handles the sudden file loss gracefully with an error message ('File missing, please reconnect') instead of crashing or freezing.

steps: Login with an account that has an expired iOS subscription but a new, active Android Play Store subscription
Tap 'Restore Purchase' on the Android device
tests.expected_result: The system prioritizes the most recent active receipt and updates the account to Premium, ignoring the expired legacy receipt.
